titleStmt.title: SII 22.54: original edition by G.V. Srinivasa Rao
No. 54. (A.R. No. 54 of 1906) TANJAVUR DISTRICT, MAYURAM TALUK, TIRUMAYĀNAM BRAHMAPURĪŚVARA TEMPLE—ON THE SAME WALL. TRIBH. KŌNĒRINMAIKOṆḌAṈ ? 22nd. YEAR.

summary.p: This records the king's order to the tax-officers (Varikkūṟu-śeyvār) communicated through the Secretary Rājendraśiṅga-Mūvēndvēḷāṉ and 4 other officers, renewing the grant of a tax-free land 13 vēli and odd in extent, situated in Rājādhirājamaṅgalam which was a tax-free dēvadāna and tirunāmattukkāṇi village belonging to god Tirumayānam-Uḍaiyār at Tirukkaḍavūr. The land is said to have been converted into tirappu in the king's 4th year and hence perhaps this present order of renewal.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī ..tribhuvaṉaccakravatti koneriṉmai koṇṭāṉ jayaṅkoṇṭa coḻavaḷanāṭṭu brahmateyam tirukkaṭavūr Uṭaiyār tirumayāṉamuṭaiyār koyiṟ tevakaṉmikkum śrīmāheśvarak kaṇkāṇi ceyvārkaḷukkum śrīkāriyañceyvāṉukkum Ittevarkkut tirunāmattukkāṇiyum tevatāṉa Iṟaiyiliyumāṉa Innāṭṭu rājādhirājamaṅkalattu nālāvatu māṟi tiṟappu nilam patiṉ muṉṟe Aṟumāvarai Araik kāṇikkiḻaraiye muṉṟumāvum Irupattiraṇṭāvatu pacāṉmutal paḻampaṭiye tevatāṉa Iṟaiyiliyāka Antarāyam pāṭṭamuḷppaṭa niṟkakaṭavatākac colli Ippaṭi kaṇakkilum I
ṭṭukkoḷḷakkaṭavarkaḷāka varikkūṟu ceyvārkaḷukkum coṉṉom Innilam Irupattiraṇṭāvatu pacāṉmutal paḻampaṭiye tevatāṉa Iṟaiyili yākak kaikkoḷka Eḻutiṉāṉ tirumantiraolai rājentiraciṅka muventaveḷāṉ Eṉṟum Ivai viḻuppādharāyaṉ Eḻutteṉṟum Ivai kurukularāyaṉ Eḻutteṉṟum Ivai cetiyarāyaṉ Eḻutteṉṟum Ivai kāṅkayarāyaṉ Eḻutteṉṟum ..
Digital edition of SII 22.54 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
